title: Horse Recall and Accessories
description: Right click while shifting with a horn to bind it to your horse. Blowing it will recall your horse. Also adds a third slot on horses for accessories.
body:
This mod is a combination of ideas I had for horses.

# HORSE RECALL
This was inspired by Horseman. It's a feature on the 1.21 version, but it isn't present on 1.20.1, so I ported it.
Bind your horse to a horn with **right click + shift**. Now you can recall it from anywhere! No more losing your horse because it wandered away. ¡Woohoo!

# ACCESSORIES SLOT
It's a third slot on the horse inventory intended for minor gameplay changes. 

![Horse GUI with a saddlebag equiped](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6cec59f41209b42e78af2cb3a13e1415cc0b90b.png)

So far I've done:
-Horseshoes (inspired by the Horseshoes mod on Fabric)
Gives your horse extra movement speed. Can be made of iron or gold.

-Lead (inspired by Horseman 1.21)

-Saddlebag (original idea)
Similar to donkeys or llamas, but a bit inferior. Gives 5 inventory slots to your horse.
